vineclub.hero_subtitle: Earn credits with every booking and wine pre-purchase. Unlock exclusive tier benefits, collect shareable digital certificates, and experience Rheingau like never before.
vineclub.tiers_sub: Earn more credits, unlock richer rewards. Every booking takes you closer to the next level.
vineclub.credits_sub: Credits accumulate across all your bookings and wine pre-purchases — the more you explore, the faster you rise.
vineclub.credits_note: Credits never expire. They accumulate automatically with every confirmed booking.
vineclub.register_sub: Join thousands of wine lovers. Membership is free — credits start accumulating from your very first booking.
vineclub.newsletter_label: Send me exclusive offers & curated wine picks
vineclub.payment_notice: Your card is tokenised via Stripe. VineBond never stores or processes raw banking data — PCI DSS SAQ-A compliant.
vineclub.success_body: Your membership is confirmed. Your payment method has been securely saved via Stripe. Start earning credits from your very next booking.
vineclub.cert_sub: Each tier comes with a beautiful digital certificate. Download it as a PNG or share a direct link.

footer.brand_desc: Connecting wine enthusiasts with the world's finest vineyards. Book authentic experiences, explore terroir, and join a global community of wine lovers.
